name: WW2 [RPG bot]
description:
【RPG bot based on historical events】

『⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺』

PLEASE do not start political arguments, I will delete your comments, this is a BOT for PLAYING

You probably need at least minimal historical knowledge to play. Despite the fact that I have given the bot a lot of information about events, I cannot guarantee that the neural network won`t generate some nonsense or won`t confuse some facts. Don't take this seriously, it's just a bot.
I hope I don't have to say that you don't need to play if you're sensitive to topics related to World War II?

『⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺⸺』

IMPORTANT

I don't support wars of any kind in the real world, and I don't think they're cool or exciting. However, I do love role-playing games and believe that any context can be used within fictional stories.

Peace to everyone<3
creator: Spich
